specific_courses: ["Ninth-Grade Literature and Composition","American Literature and Composition"]
notes: 4 units required. One unit Ninth-Grade Literature and Composition. One unit American Literature and Composition. 2 additional English/Language Arts core units from state-approved courses.

specific_courses: ["Algebra or equivalent","Geometry or equivalent","Advanced Algebra or equivalent"]
notes: 4 units required. Must include Algebra, Geometry, and Advanced Algebra or equivalents. The fourth unit must be selected from state-approved mathematics core courses.

specific_courses: ["Biology","Physical Science or Physics","Chemistry, Earth Systems, Environmental Science, or AP/IB course"]
notes: 4 units required. One unit Biology. One unit Physical Science or Physics. One unit Chemistry, Earth Systems, Environmental Science, or an AP/IB course. One additional Science core. The 4th science unit may be used to meet both the science and elective requirements.
3 units required. One unit US History. One unit World History. One-half unit American Government/Civics. One-half unit Economics.

subject_category: CTAE, Modern Language/Latin, or Fine Arts
notes: 3 units required from CTAE and/or Modern Language/Latin and/or Fine Arts. Students choose from these areas for a total of 3 units.
substitution_notes: Students complete three units from CTAE and/or Modern Language/Latin and/or Fine Arts; the state rule does not require all three categories.

notes: 1 unit combined Health and Physical Education required.
4 elective units required. Total minimum 23 units.

specific_courses: ["Literature and Composition II","Algebra: Concepts and Connections","Biology","U.S. History"]
notes: Students must take designated EOC assessments in these courses, subject to the exemptions in Rule 160-3-1-.07.
